hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE "(rm[[:space:]]+-rf?[[:space:]]+/|drop[[:space:]]+(table|database|schema)|truncate[[:space:]]+table|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+(--force(-with-lease)?|-f)|chmod[[:space:]]+777[[:space:]]+/|mkfs|dd[[:space:]]+if=.*of=/dev/)"; then echo "[one-way-door warning] This command is hard to undo. Read it twice before continuing." >&2; fi; exit 0'
